ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "director" TEXT /* Name of the hospital director */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact email for the hospital */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the hospital */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the hospital is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the hospital is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the hospital's location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital offering the program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervising doctor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "program_type" TEXT /* Type of the program (e.g., clinical, non-clinical) */,
  "program_status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES supervisors ("supervisor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supervisors" (
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supervisor */,
  "supervisor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the supervisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supervisor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the supervisor */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the supervisor */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supervisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital where the participant is affiliated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant (e.g., resident, intern) */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the participant */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the session in hours */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic covered in the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of the session (e.g., lecture, workshop) */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendances" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the participant attended the session */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Current status of the attendance (e.g., pending, confirmed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendances_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedbacks" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the participant (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Current status of the feedback (e.g., submitted, reviewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedbacks_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., resident, intern, supervisor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the role entails */,
  "role_status" TEXT /* Current status of the role (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hospital to which the department belongs */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department (e.g., Surgery, Pain Management) */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_departments_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_topics" (
  "topic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each topic */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "topic_name" TEXT /* Name of the topic */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the topic */,
  "topic_status" TEXT /* Current status of the topic (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("topic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_topics_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the session to which the resource pertains */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource (e.g., presentation, article) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path or link to the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., document, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Current status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user account */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "program_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training program */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was submitted */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the participant (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_evaluations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_program_evaluations_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant providing the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the evaluation was submitted */,
  "overall_rating" INTEGER /* Overall rating given by the participant (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_evaluations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_evaluations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
